summary: REQ-12 (Getting Started) and REQ-13 (Data Privacy & Security + reachable link/anchor) appear to be implemented on the Services page, and REQ-14 (Trillboards FAQ + video placeholder + testimonial block) appears to be implemented on the Trillboards page. REQ-15 (replacing the actual logo/favicon image assets at the specified public paths) is not evidenced in the diff summary, so it appears missing/incomplete.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the site logo and favicon assets with versions derived from the uploaded logo images, stored at /frontend/public/assets/generated/brick-india-logo.dim_512x512.png and /frontend/public/assets/generated/favicon.dim_64x64.png, ensuring header/footer logo and favicon load correctly without code path changes.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the header uses /assets/generated/brick-india-logo.dim_512x512.png, but there is no evidence that the actual PNG logo and favicon files were added/updated at the required public paths (no asset file changes are shown). The modified file list contains only TSX/pages and summaries, not the required PNG outputs.
evidence: file-diff summary shows: Added: 0, Modified: 5 (no public asset files listed)

hallucinated_features.description: Trillboards FAQ includes fully authored questions/answers beyond the user-provided content cues/headings.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-14 specifies using only the provided headings/content cues (Common Questions / See It In Action / Hear from a Trillboards screen owner) and allows placeholders if content is not provided. The diff shows a populated `faqs` array with specific Q&A content that was not provided in the BuildRequest.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/TrillboardsPage.tsx (shows `const faqs = [...]` with detailed question/answer strings)
